description:
This intermediate-to-advanced PostgreSQL quiz tests proficiency in SQL syntax, database design, and problem-solving with a mix of common and obscure features. The engaging, encouraging tone emphasizes learning through challenges, targeting developers and DBAs seeking to deepen their expertise.
Topics: built-in aggregates, type casting, constraints, SQL syntax, database design
Audience: PostgreSQL developers and database administrators aiming to reinforce or expand their knowledge of advanced PostgreSQL concepts and best practices.
